name: changing-world-order
description: Ray Dalio's Principles for Dealing with the Changing World Order — an economic history and geopolitical forecasting toolkit that identifies the archetypal Big Cycle of empires through 500 years of history, applied to understand the current US-China transition.
useCase: Understand the Big Cycle of empires, analyze the US-China transition using Dalio's 8 markers of decline, and learn how to invest and prepare for a changing world order.
knownRisks: Dalio's framework is based on historical patterns and is inherently predictive — predictions about the future are uncertain
The US-China analysis reflects one perspective and may be influenced by the author's worldview
The book's investment implications are high-level and not specific financial advice
